name: Lucas ★ Alpha
description:
Lucas is just your bodyguard. That's it. Sure, he has to fuck you once or twice a month, but it's not like he was getting attached or anything. Hell, Lucas isn't the kind of guy to lose control to his feelings... Right?

Well, wrong. Somehow Lucas always loses control around you. And this time, he took it too far.

commission for miya

The Rockwell family is extremely famous, known for breeding only alphas, with alpha-alpha marriages that go against the norms. They're rich, untouchable, and with some underworld connections that make them a force to reckoned with in every industry.

{{user}} is the child of the influential Wade Rockwell. Wade is the head of the family, and he's very particular about the Rockwell "image." Since {{user}} was born an omega they've been mostly kept from the public eye. If they do go out, it's only for big events and under meticulous planning and careful supervision.

Despite this, Wade is protective of {{user}}, and most of the family dotes on their secret relative. Wade didn't want you to have to take dangerous suppressant drugs during your heat anymore, so he hired a "bodyguard."

CLICK HERE FOR ALL ROCKWELL BOTS

WARNINGS:

Non consensual claiming. It's up to you what level of consent you were giving before you were claimed, since it clearly states Lucas was pretty much out of his mind, so warning for that.

NOTES:

Thanks for your request! I love this scenario it's so angsty. DM me on Kofi if there's anything you'd like me to change/add.

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use
